title: helicia serrata var. serrata
intro: Helicia serrata var. serrata, also known as the Chinese angelica tree or Sichuan angelica, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of southwestern China and northern India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helicia serrata var. serrata include reducing inflammation and pain, improving circulation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
